prompt: A bug report says routes with variables and custom regular expressions match the wrong path or produce wrong variables. Localize the likely implementation and regression tests.

expected_symbols.name: newRouteRegexp
expected_symbols.why: Parses templates and compiles route matching regular expressions.

expected_symbols.name: routeRegexp
expected_symbols.why: Stores compiled regular expressions and variable names.

expected_symbols.name: Route.Path
expected_symbols.why: Adds path matchers that use route regular expressions.

expected_symbols.name: Router.Match
expected_symbols.why: Runs route matching and populates the match result.

expected_claims.text: Route template parsing and variable extraction should be inspected in regexp.go.
Route.Path is relevant because it creates path matchers from route templates.
Router.Match is relevant for how successful matches and variables are carried into request handling.
Regression coverage should include route regexp tests and request matching tests.

forbidden_claims.text: Variable route matching is implemented only in middleware.go.
Custom route regular expressions do not affect path matching.
